prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约5750→25036（断档异常）→8542→6799→8808；2022年出现严重断档后迅速恢复，近3年位次在6800–8800区间波动，2025年基准约8808名，较2024年有所后移；该校在陕西理科/物理类计划：2021年83人、2022年88人、2023年94人、2024年95人、2025年85人；2026年计划102人，较2025年扩招约20%，扩招幅度较大，理论上会推高位次数字（竞争加剧）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021–2026年稳定在第21–22名，属于全国顶尖高校行列，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年声誉评价偏负面（主要源于早年学伴事件遗留影响），但抖音热度排名第20位（高热），短视频曝光量较高；2022年陕西理科曾出现严重断档（25036名），但2023年起已恢复正常，断档的滞后心理影响基本消退；第五轮学科评估中拥有数学A+、中国语言文学A、马克思主义理论A、控制科学与工程A、外国语言文学A等19个A-/A/A+学科，学科实力雄厚，对报考有较强支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业社会热度持续高热推荐；陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7%，竞争明显加剧；山东大学位于山东省，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；在陕西招生计划占比较小，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次8808名、2026年扩招约20%（推高位次）、陕西省物理类考生增加约19.7%（推高位次）以及学校高层次的稳定吸引力，供需弹性主值计算得9865名；扩招与考生增量大致对冲，学校层次和工科专业热度对位次有支撑，故不做额外修正。预测2026年理科/物理类最低位次约9865名，区间9365–10365名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 5750 → 25036 (abnormal gap) → 8542 → 6799 → 8808; a severe gap occurred in 2022 but quickly recovered, with rankings fluctuating between 6800–8800 in the past 3 years. The 2025 baseline is about 8808, slightly lower than 2024. Enrollment plans in Shaanxi for science/physics category: 83 in 2021, 88 in 2022, 94 in 2023, 95 in 2024, 85 in 2025; 102 in 2026, an increase of about 20% compared to 2025, which theoretically pushes the ranking number higher (increased competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science Chinese University Ranking stable at 21st–22nd from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top tier of national universities, with sustained strong appeal to high-scoring students; reputation evaluation in 2026 is slightly negative (mainly due to lingering effects of the early 'study partner' incident), but Douyin popularity ranks 20th (high heat), with high short video exposure; a severe gap occurred in Shaanxi science in 2022 (25036), but has returned to normal since 2023, and the lagging psychological impact of the gap has largely dissipated; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 19 A-/A/A+ disciplines including Mathematics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Marxist Theory A, Control Science and Engineering A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, with strong disciplinary strength providing solid support for applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly popular and recommended; the number of physics category examinees in Shaanxi in 2026 is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Shandong University is located in Shandong Province, not a local university in Shaanxi, with no local enrollment preference; its enrollment plan in Shaanxi accounts for a small proportion, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 8808, an enrollment expansion of about 20% in 2026 (pushing ranking higher), an increase of about 19.7% in Shaanxi physics category examinees (pushing ranking higher), and the stable appeal of the university's high level, the supply-demand elasticity main value calculates to 9865; the expansion and examinee increase roughly offset each other, and the university level and popularity of engineering majors support the ranking, so no additional correction is made. The predicted minimum ranking for science/physics category in 2026 is about 9865, with a range of 9365–10365.
